claim.observation: The trusted audit-availability summary scanned the SIFT-visible case evidence, CYLR extract, and derived VANKO outputs. It reports all selected roots present, 6644 files visited, 1808 small text/config/database-like files content-scanned, zero admin-CLI-config name candidates, and zero precise server-audit content-marker files, while still recording 34 local client-cloud marker files.
claim.interpretation: This is a local artifact availability boundary only: the scanned local evidence did not expose a Google Workspace/Admin/GAM/GWS-style server audit export or admin CLI config surface. It does not prove no provider-side cloud event; completed cloud-event proof would still require an external/server-side audit export or equivalent receipt.
